form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== chartId[控制图] orgId[业务组织] periodFrom[周期起] periodTo[周期止] calculatedBy[计算人] calculatedAt[计算时间] =========>sample[样本信息]====== sampleCount[样本数] totalObservations[观测总数] grandMean[总均值] overallStdDev[整体标准差] withinStdDev[组内标准差] =========>capability[能力指标]====== cp[Cp] cpk[Cpk] pp[Pp] ppk[Ppk] cpm[Cpm] capabilityLevel[能力等级] isStable[是否稳定] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== chartId[控制图] orgId[业务组织] periodFrom[周期起] periodTo[周期止] calculatedBy[计算人] calculatedAt[计算时间] =========>sample[样本信息]====== sampleCount[样本数] totalObservations[观测总数] grandMean[总均值] overallStdDev[整体标准差] withinStdDev[组内标准差] =========>capability[能力指标]====== cp[Cp] cpk[Cpk] pp[Pp] ppk[Ppk] cpm[Cpm] capabilityLevel[能力等级] isStable[是否稳定] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: chartId[控制图] orgId[业务组织] capabilityLevel[能力等级] isStable[是否稳定] periodFrom[周期起]
